immutable_core.semantic_definition: A positive-only episode asset retaining one row for each ICU-stay interval during which vasopressor-capable support is active under the approved source-role inclusion rule.
immutable_core.semantic_grain: one row per positive state episode
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Any database asset published as std_vasopressor_support_active must preserve any-vasopressor-support active-state scope and must not silently widen to inotrope-only therapy, norepinephrine-equivalent dose, septic-shock phenotype, vasopressor-free days, or agent-specific episode detail.

state_episode_contract.episode_start_rule: start at the approved vasopressor-capable source interval start
state_episode_contract.episode_end_rule: end at the approved vasopressor-capable source interval end
state_episode_contract.continuity_rule: merge only overlapping or exactly contiguous approved vasopressor-capable source intervals within the same ICU stay; any positive gap starts a new episode
state_episode_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained positive vasopressor-support episode under the approved source-role rule

external_alignment.alignment_policy: Use external terminologies as semantic anchors when reliable, but do not make them the backbone of the standard-variable system.
external_alignment.note: The current MVP identity is governed primarily by reviewed vasoactive infusion-course evidence, ICU-stay interval semantics, and positive-only episode rules.

new_variable_trigger_examples: changing the concept to agent-specific vasopressor support episode
changing the concept to norepinephrine-equivalent dose
changing the concept to septic shock onset
changing the output to vasopressor-free days
adding explicit false rows instead of positive-only retained episodes
version_bump_trigger_examples: adding a new reviewed database mapping while preserving any-vasopressor-support active-state meaning
tightening a duration caution threshold without changing retained state semantics
changing a documented source-role inclusion policy while preserving the same variable identity

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal std_vasopressor_support_active outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec. Execute-mode runtime evidence should record both spec hashes and formal output-file signatures.
execution_governance.future_non_bypassable_rule: Formal std_vasopressor_support_active outputs should be generated only through the governed execution.py path reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec.
